name: Gliński's Hexagonal Chess
author: Władysław Gliński (1936) / AGP port
description: The classic hexagonal chess variant, invented by Władysław Gliński in 1936 and once played by half a million people. 91 hexes, three bishops on the three cell colours, nine pawns, a 12-direction queen — and stalemate scores 3/4-1/4 instead of a draw.
